query: Record an ADR: we decided to use PostgreSQL as the primary store.
expected_behavior: Runs scripts/next-adr.mjs to compute the next NNNN and scaffold content (read-only)

query: What number will the next ADR get?
expected_behavior: Runs next-adr.mjs which derives the next number from existing docs/adr files
Reports the number and target path without writing a file
Recognizes this is out of scope for adr-write
Does not create a new ADR
